Maintain a compact working world model of what the current level seems to contain, what actions appear to do, what the goal seems to be, what is still uncertain, and what plan currently looks best.

end of world model.

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try RIGHT from state 15
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print(f"RIGHT result: board_changed={result.get('board_changed')}, no_impact={result.get('no_impact')}, done={result.get('done')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['B', 'c', 'Y', 'W'] and n['pixels'] <= 100:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print(f"\nCurrent state: {state_graph.current}")
print(f"Tried actions: {state_graph.tried_actions(state_graph.current)}")

lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Area around shapes ===")
for i in range(17, 28):
    print(f"Row {i}: '{lines[i][22:42]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
